commands.review_summary:
This Dependabot PR updates actions/create-github-app-token from v3 to v3.1.1 in workflows and advances openai/codex-action from the v1.7 commit to the v1.8 commit in agent workflows.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a GitHub Actions dependency-update PR, not a runtime bug report. The meaningful check is workflow compatibility against current workflow inputs and upstream action metadata.
